basic_details.job_title: NFC General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 21 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from a recognized University with One Year relevant experience after obtaining requisite qualification
qualification.details: MBBS from a recognized University with One Year relevant experience after obtaining requisite qualification. Mandatory Internship will not be counted as experience. Candidate should possess valid registration from Medical Council of India. Candidate with institutional experience will be given preference.

vacancy_details.Post Name: General Duty Medical Officer (Adhoc / Locum Basis)

all_official_links.label: Download NFC General Duty Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NFC General Duty Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the General Duty Medical Officer posts at Nuclear Fuel Complex (NFC) is scheduled for 21 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the General Duty Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized university and have at least one year of relevant experience after obtaining their qualification. Mandatory internship will not be counted as experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the General Duty Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the General Duty Medical Officer position is 50 years as of 21 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the General Duty Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the General Duty Medical Officer (Adhoc / Locum Basis) position at the Nuclear Fuel Complex (NFC).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the General Duty Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the General Duty Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,06,804/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NFC General Duty Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Nuclear Fuel Complex (NFC) located?
faq.answer: The Nuclear Fuel Complex (NFC) is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500062.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the General Duty Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the General Duty Medical Officer posts will be based on a Walk-In-Interview conducted by the Nuclear Fuel Complex (NFC).
